race_meta.race_name: Mayo Wynne Baxter Novices' Limited Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked desert halo at position 4 with only 9.0% probability. Top pick was Lord Of The Glance (38.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Lord Of The Glance > Kotari, but actual result was Desert Halo > Lord Of The Glance. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Desert Halo had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -0.1%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
